news.t: Asset Allocation Summit: Opportunities in Direxion's Leveraged-Inverse Suite
Direxion launches new leveraged ETFs tied to Palantir, Berkshire Hathaway
Direxion Unveils Berkshire Hathaway and Palantir Single Stock Leveraged and Inverse ETFs

holdings.infoBox: PLTD is an equity ETF with a total of 13 individual holdings.

overview.description: The Direxion Dailly PLTR Bear 1X ETF (PLTD) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in information technology equity. The fund provides inverse (-1x) exposure, less fees and expenses, to the daily price movement for shares of Palantir Technologies Stock. PLTD was launched on Dec 11, 2024 and is issued by Direxion.
